design_philosophy: Healthy, trustworthy, and modern SaaS. Distinctive from generic white AI-slop SaaS. Focus on operational clarity, F-pattern data scanning, and tactile neumorphic touches without heaviness.

components.scan_bar: Hero-like prominence at the top of the dashboard. Full width, large input field, clean icon. Focus state should ring with primary color.
components.stat_cards: 4 grid layout. Use subtle icons. Number should be prominent (Cabinet Grotesk).
components.tables: Clean, border-bottom only for rows. Use badge components for status. Right-align numeric/price columns. Hover state on rows.
components.badges: Soft background, solid text. Fully rounded (rounded-full).
components.tabs: Inline tabs. Active state uses border-bottom with primary color, or soft pill background.
components.drawers: Slide-in from right. Must have a backdrop blur (backdrop-blur-sm bg-slate-900/20). Keep header fixed, scrollable content.
components.empty_states: Use subtle blob backgrounds or soft grey circles behind a Lucide icon. Clear heading, muted description text, and a primary CTA button.

interactions.hover: Subtle translate-y-[-2px] and elevated shadow for cards. Buttons must explicitly set text color on hover.

auth_background.description: Modern pharmacy interior for Login/Register split screen background

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: Language: ENTIRE UI must be in Turkish.
Icons: Use lucide-react strictly. No emojis.
Bento Grid on Dashboard: Use 1 full width for Scan Bar, 4 cols for stats, and split remaining space for Critical Stock Widget and Recent Orders Widget.
Auth Flow: Implement a beautiful split-screen layout for Login/Register with the auth_background image taking up half the screen. Add an overlay (bg-[#1a6b4a]/20) to the image for brand feel.

Sidebar: Must include active states using the primary_light background. Include Dashboard, Katalog, Stok, Siparişler. Also include disabled placeholders for İskonto, Raporlar, Tedarikçiler, Entegrasyonlar.
Shadcn Components: Heavily customize them to match the border radii (rounded-xl/2xl) and the organic soft shadow style. Do not leave default Vercel-like sharp edges.
